channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: How big of a problem is the Strait of Hormuz for Donald Trump?
item.description: US president frustrated with unenthusiastic response after appealing for help wresting control of key strait from Iran.

item.title: Hezbollah rocket hits a residential building in Israel’s Nahariya
item.description: Firefighters battled a blaze at a residential building in Nahariya, Israel after a Hezbollah rocket hit it.

item.title: Civilians pulled from rubble after US-Israeli strikes on Tehran
item.description: Rescuers have pulled civilians from the rubble after a new wave of US-Israeli strikes targeted Tehran.

item.title: US responsible for deadly attack on Iranian school: Amnesty International
item.description: Rights group says Tomahawk missile likely used in Minab school strike that killed at least 170 people, mostly children.

item.title: Afghanistan says children among four killed in latest attacks by Pakistan
item.description: The civilians - three children and a woman - are killed in an attack on Khost province, local official says.

item.title: US, Israel now know ‘what kind of nation they are dealing with’
item.description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says his country has shown it is ready to take the war “as far as necessary".

item.title: How badly has the Iran war hit the global economy? The tell-tale signs
item.description: Oil and gas price hikes due to the war have rattled the global economy.

item.title: Is Russia benefitting from the Iran war?
item.description: The US is allowing the purchase of Russian oil that’s stranded at sea after the war on Iran led to higher energy prices.

item.title: Iran officials tout ‘Trump-burning’ celebration amid battle of narratives
item.description: Iranian state media calls for turning fire festival into a symbolic protest by burning figures of Trump and Netanyahu.

item.title: European leaders reject military involvement in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Pushback comes as US President Donald Trump says NATO allies should help secure key waterway amid soaring oil prices.
